nodes.label: AI as scheduling assistant for complex logistics
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable source requiring verification
nodes.grounding_span: It's is like my expert logistics person that I can get info from

nodes.label: AI accuracy in numerical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I've had a few out-of-date phone numbers or numbers that go to a part of the business that isn't directly related

nodes.label: Personalized human approach in relationship building
nodes.grounding_span: I try to use a personalized human approach whenever I'm calling or reaching out to a person

nodes.label: AI as tool for career advancement
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to human skills and job security
nodes.grounding_span: I want to use AI to tell me ways to approach skill-building for things that are essentially 'AI-proof'

nodes.label: Business success and contract acquisition
nodes.grounding_span: I was able to get a contract with 11 loads a month from one of the prospects I found from using an AI-generated list

nodes.label: Authentic human connection and trust
nodes.grounding_span: I've had the most success with just genuinely engaging with potential partners or customers

nodes.label: Career resilience and adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: I'm still trying to figure out what skills would be good to work on that AI can't 'take over'

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for initial lead generation
nodes.grounding_span: I was able to get a contract with 11 loads a month from one of the prospects I found from using an AI-generated list so I was very satisfied with that

nodes.label: Frustration with outdated AI information
nodes.grounding_span: there have been times when the list that it has provided had a few businesses that were no longer in business, so the information was outdated

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing skills
nodes.grounding_span: it is definitely a concern. I'm always trying to figure out things that human offer to the industry that can't be automated

nodes.label: Optimism about AI for career advancement
nodes.grounding_span: I want to use AI to tell me ways to approach skill-building for things that are essentially 'AI-proof'

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I start with a broad request... From there, I will start to be more specific and ask for revisions

nodes.label: Systematic verification through cross-referencing
nodes.grounding_span: I usually take the business names and google them to get more details about the company
